title: Delivery Tags, Acknowledgements, and Redelivery · Go Semantics Case: Delivery Tag Channel Scope

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Predict Delivery Tag Channel Scope · Theory Delivery Tag Channel Scope
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go messaging team handles case 6917 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce same-generation exactly-one terminal delivery decision after durable effect; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then fail the canary and prove older Go consumers remain compatible. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge, nack, or reject a delivery exactly once on its owning channel and prevent stale or cross-channel tag use; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
